name: SelfieSat / BioSat / FramSat
description: End-to-end CubeSat projects with ORBIT NTNU. PCB design, systems engineering, integration, and CDR participation across three satellite missions.

name: Precise Orbit Determination
description: Developed an algorithm at ESA ESOC using GNSS data for precise orbit determination on the OPS-SAT mission. Python-based pipeline with real satellite telemetry.

name: Ship SOS Relay Simulation
description: Simulated ship emergency beacons relayed through low-earth-orbit satellites using GNU Radio, Python, and ML models for signal classification.

name: Wobble 2 & Astrogrip
description: Contributed electronics design, assembly, and systems testing for two satellite projects at BEARS, TU Berlin during the exchange year.

name: World Solar Challenge
description: Logistics, competition planning, and regulation documentation for Nordlys NTNU's participation in the World Solar Challenge 2025 in Australia.

name: Design Thinking & Shared Ignorance
description: Co-authored paper on Design Thinking as a Framework for Student–Faculty Partnerships. Published in International Journal for Students as Partners, 2024.
